text.message: yall really perfectly covered the board for me lol
some unlucky games for me today

im easily last, not sure how i got robbed

maybe between you 3, but im dead last so :)
didnt even give me a chance to accept the trade. would rather give black 2 bricks he dont make
Black wants to help me take road from red

Not sure why red not fighting army
bad block, cause now a knight is coming your way
hit the 5 wheat and i wouldnt play it
blue, without a single brick to his name, has built twice my roads with the best brick on the board :D
was noticing the use of they earlier lol
